title: Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table OUT

detail.title: Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table OUT
detail.short_info: Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table released for BE/BTech, ME/MTech & MBA. Check regulation-wise schedule and download official PDF at annauniv.edu.

sections.heading: Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table OUT

content.text: Anna University has published the April May 2026 Exam Time Table for various UG and PG courses. Students studying under Regulations 2025 and 2021 can now access their respective exam schedules and start preparing accordingly.
Download the official time table PDF using the direct links provided above. Students are advised to verify the exam dates as per their regulation and department.

sections.heading: Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table Overview

content.text: Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table has been released for Engineering, Technology, and Management programmes. The schedule covers theory examinations for multiple regulations and courses.

sections.heading: Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table Subject Wise

content.text: The Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table contains detailed subject-wise examination dates for different branches and semesters. Students can find their specific papers, codes, and exam dates in the respective PDF files.
Separate time tables have been released for UG and PG programmes under different regulations. Download the PDF relevant to your course and regulation to view the complete subject-wise schedule.

sections.heading: How to Download Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table

content.text: Students can easily download the Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table from the official sources. Follow these simple steps to get your timetable.

items: Visit the official Anna University website or trusted academic portals.
Navigate to the Examination or Time Table section.
Select your course, regulation, and semester.
Click on the relevant April May 2026 time table link.
Open the PDF and download it to your device.
Take a printout and note down all your exam dates.

content.text: Always refer to the official time table and keep a copy for your exam preparation. Cross-check the dates with your syllabus and academic calendar.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table

content.text: The official Anna University April May 2026 Exam Time Table contains all necessary information for students appearing in the upcoming examinations.

items: Examination dates and days
Subject names and paper codes
Session timings (Forenoon / Afternoon)
Regulation and semester details
Important instructions for students
Branch-wise and semester-wise schedule.
